issues.description: TrashFromHand should have a condition checking if Leader has {Straw Hat Crew} type before the PowerBoost is applied. The condition 'If your Leader has the {Straw Hat Crew} type' must gate the power boost, not be implicit.

PowerBoost target scope is incorrect. The card states 'up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards', meaning the player chooses which single card (Leader OR one Character), not that all can be boosted. Target should reflect this choice constraint.
